[[inst_casb]]
==== CASB

*Syntax:* casb<.{aq, rl, aqrl}> [SrcL], SrcR, SrcD, ->{t, u, Rd}

*Description:* 32-bit compare-and-swap byte: if ([SrcL]==SrcR) [SrcL]=SrcD; RegDst=old([SrcL]). Independent input/output registers.

*Encoding:*

image::../generated/encodings/enc_casb.svg[CASB encoding,width=800]

*Uop-Class:* -

*Compression:* L32 (len=32)
